headline: U.S. CISA adds Cisco and PTC Windchill and FlexPLM flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog
bullets: U.S. CISA adds Cisco and PTC Windchill and FlexPLM flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog — covered by Securityaffairs, CISA Advisories
Lead: First-Ever Exploitation of PTC Windchill Vulnerability Discovered in the Wild (also: r/cybersecurity)
BREAKING THREATS: First-Ever Exploitation of PTC Windchill Vulnerability Discovered in the Wild
